name: Off-The-Shelf Crockpot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mixed dried beans (17 bean types per package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Cook on high for 5-6 hours, or until beans are tender.
3. Add the cooked macaroni and cook for an additional 10-20 minutes to soften, if desired.
